reviews.review_description: I used this app as a last resort at work!  I am a nurse and had a patient post op who was experiencing a allergic reaction to anesthesia.  Her brain raed telling her that her body was on fire!  We fought for forty minutes! We couldn't break it....All I could think was grabbing my Oculous and this app.  It was able to calm her within ten minutes,  she was asleep!  No extra meds!  She was able to go home instead of meds, breathing tube and icu stay!  Amazing!

developer_response.body: Thank you for this review by all our staff that was enthusiastic about it. This kind of appreciations are the inspiring and motivating us for keep effort in our work and our development! And my sister is a nurse too ;) Best regards.

reviews.review_description: This is up there with my best vr experience graphics excellent  just sit back and wonder at the view so relaxing well worth money
Well done experience, and also very convenient to introduce someone to vr!
Very relaxing

I really enjoyed this app, particularly the night mode, but please please please drop the fairies should you ever do an update. I don't know what you were thinking about there? 
I believe there has been other commitments as to how bad the fairies are.
If you do get rid of them then you'll get an extra star from me.
I love it on my gear vr but will not work on my Oculus go at all can not start repeat will not work on go at all would get 5 stars Doesn't  work on Go

developer_response.body: Thank you for reporting, the app now is fixed and works with Oculus GO.

reviews.review_description:
Would like to keep but will refund since there are disturbing stutters and bad fps on my s7. All background apps off and even flightmode enabled. It may be only optimized for s8. 

As a sidenote there are big black shadows which seem like a bug because they don't look natural!

Am hoping the 'Relax River' app will be available for the OculusQuest2? It's my favourite app ad I'll be getting a Quest 2 soon.  I have my fingers crossed. Thanks
Ps....don't mind the Fairies :)

reviews.review_title: Needs to be on quest 2 & dreamland
reviews.review_description: Missing this on quest 2

This was one of my favorite apps from the GO.  However, my GO is burning out & useless.  Now I have the original Quest and this app is not available nor their website.  I can't seem to reach them to request to make the app available for the Quest.  I guess they sailed off to Ocean.  Well.. so much for one of my favorite apps 🙄

reviews.review_title: Major bug on Oculus Go with water
reviews.review_description: The water start correctly, but the further into the ride, the water becomes very pixelized with jerky animation, almost .gif like. Please increase and improve the FPS.

developer_response.body: Bug fixed. Thanks for reporting. Now water should be ok.

reviews.review_description: Nice sceneries (good graphics).  I like the horses and the ferries, because that was out of the norm.  Need to have more defferent sceneries and more wildlife (or creatures).  It was putting me to sleep.  I kept dosing off.  Sorry, too boring for me.  lol

I love relaxing in vr. The concept is good, but it need update. For example I see big black areas in the stones. Is it normal on s7? Looks weird and on amoled screen it's not recommended using dark blacks, because when I look around colours will blur. It often has microstutters, very disturbing especially at relaxing apps. And the movement could be a little faster. Just a little, 1.5-2x increase. Now feels like a slowmo. Good work, just update please!!!

reviews.review_title: Very relaxing until the Fairies appear.
reviews.review_description: This is very relaxing ,calming and pleasant experience until the Fairies show up. They are scary zombie looking creatures and really freaked me out. Bad idea adding these with the way they currently look. Maybe Fairies that looked like Tinkerbell would have been a better choice. Something cute and magical. Overall I enjoyed it very much...minus the fairies. Please get rid of them or change the way they look.

What a great experience. Very relaxing. And the water looks great. I’m using the Oculus Go. Very impressed.

YOU HAVE TO MAKE ANOTHER ONE!!!

developer_response.body: It is in the store. Dream Journey !

reviews.review_description: Not sure where all the good reviews are coming from. The frame rate is choppy when looking at the passing scenery which makes the whole experience feel quite nauseating. Every other VR title runs flawlessly on my S7 except this. Waste of money, uninstalled.

developer_response.body: Yeah, a review from a competitor was exactly what we was missing :)

reviews.review_description: Photorealistic journey.  Moves slowly so you can see everything, enjoy the creatures, and just relax. Helps you unwind from the day...

This was a cool ride. You have to oay like over $25 for a real live river ride in some places. Tbis was just a few dollars. Why is everyone complaining about the faeries. I was expecting fairies from hell. There are just normal fairies. They don't have facial expressions, but rhen again this is for the oculos go. Frame rate is a littke off sometimes and can get distracting but not much. Overall great little ride.
I agree, i loved the ride , hated the fairies...
When will this be available on the Quest? Love this app.
